title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 15 August 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 15 August 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 15 August 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 19/08/2025
Activity in the ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye was largely muted, with only pockets of strength. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-08-19_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-09-August-15-August-2025.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-08-19_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-09-August-15-August-2025.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
09 August - 15 August 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Activity in the ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye was largely muted, with only pockets of strength. India managed to extend its recent
positive run in the vessel segment, though this momentum did not spill over into the local steel market.
